prompt: Create a vertical close-up anime cyberpunk portrait of a young cyberpunk woman facing the viewer with an intense, calm expression. She has short messy black hair with loose flyaway strands, pale skin, glossy lips, and vivid cyan blue eyes rendered with sharp highlights. Her hands are raised to her forehead, delicately holding up oversized transparent AR goggles like a futuristic visor; the visor is made of reflective glass and displays glowing cyan binary code, circuit traces, HUD rectangles, and vertical neon light streaks. Add large metallic over-ear headphones around her head, partially hidden by hair and the visor. She wears a black tank top with a tiny futuristic chest label reading CYBER, under an open translucent iridescent jacket with crinkled holographic plastic texture, shifting blue, violet, pink, and white reflections. Composition is a tight upper-body crop, centered face, shoulders filling the lower frame, both hands visible at the top edges, clean white background with minimal distractions. Style: highly detailed Japanese anime illustration, elegant linework, luminous sci-fi lighting, glossy reflections, prismatic chromatic highlights, cool cyan and violet palette, delicate skin shading, dramatic close-up fashion editorial feel, ultra crisp, no extra characters, no watermark.
